title: Amides
summary: 9701 A Level amides — formation, hydrolysis, and link to proteins.
learningObjectives: Draw amide structures and name amides.

simpleExplanation.title: Stable amide link
simpleExplanation.summary: Amides are much less basic than amines. The C–N bond has partial double-bond character.
steps: Peptide bond in proteins is an amide.

sections.content: **Amides** (34.3) connect **acyl chemistry** (33.3) to **34.4 amino acids** and protein structure.
